requirements.verbatim: COMPLETE ALL TASKS AND RECONDILE PROGRSS TRACKSERS SO WE CLSE TIHS CHAT AND CONTNUE WORKING ON OTHER CURRENT CHAT IN THIS JARVIS BUILD
requirements.normalised_intent: Complete all safe tasks, reconcile progress trackers, close this chat and continue in another current Jarvis chat.
requirements.reason: Repository closeout was completed, but external runtime and owner gates remain.

requirements.verbatim: CAN U SHARE THIS ENTIRE CHAT
requirements.normalised_intent: Create a shareable conversation artifact containing the complete user-visible chat.
requirements.rollback: Revert the v11 ingestion merge commit
requirements.reason: Accessible visible messages are preserved; an exact full ChatGPT UI transcript requires a share link or fresh export.

requirements.verbatim: INTERGARE ENTIRE CHAT ITO JARVIS BUILD
requirements.normalised_intent: Integrate the conversation as governed Jarvis source evidence, requirements and progress state.
requirements.evidence: GitHub branch and pull request evidence
requirements.rollback: Revert the v11 ingestion merge commit
requirements.reason: The accessible conversation scope is integrated without claiming inaccessible turns.

requirements.verbatim: ORGNAISE AND SORT THROUGH LIK JARVIS BUILD INISTRUCTED
requirements.normalised_intent: Organise and sort conversation content using Jarvis source-first, raw-versus-derived, requirement, evidence, gap and tracker controls.
requirements.evidence: Manifest, transcript, requirement registry and tracker v11
requirements.rollback: Revert the v11 ingestion merge commit
requirements.reason: The chat is separated into raw transcript, derived timeline, requirement candidates, exact gaps and continuation state.

requirements.normalised_intent: Replace the bounded reconstruction with a byte-exact complete ChatGPT conversation when a primary export becomes available.
requirements.reason: The active environment cannot create a ChatGPT share link or recover messages no longer present after context compaction.
